message:
Fix third review issues: UTF-8 encoding, clipboard unification, duplicates

Review findings and fixes:
1. Hash embedder UTF-8 fix: Changed charCodeAt() to TextEncoder.encode()
   to match Rust's str.as_bytes() behavior for non-ASCII characters
2. Unified clipboard implementations: Both copyCommand and copyToClipboard
   helper now use Bun.spawn with stdin pipe (safe for special characters)
3. Added clarification note about duplicate bundle commands in Part 13
   (canonical implementation is in Part 6)
4. Removed duplicate VERSION import in section 12.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
